steps.title: Convert the percent
steps.content: A percent means out of $100$, so $6\%=\frac{6}{100}=0.06$.

steps.title: Take 6 percent of 450
steps.content: Multiply the total number of objects by the decimal form of the percent: $$0.06(450)=27.$$

steps.title: Confirm the count
steps.content: The question asks for the number of cubes, and $6\%$ of $450$ objects is $27$ objects. Therefore there are 27 cubes in the box.
